channel.title: Temple of Elemental Evil on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Temple of Elemental Evil on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Temple Of Elemental Evil Design Highlights
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Temple of Elemental Evil design highlights.

item.title: Questions To WotC About ToEE
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to share with you questions I sent to Wizards of the Coast about Temple of Elemental Evil.

item.title: Don't Forget Temple Of Elemental Evil 2003
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to ask you not to forget about Temple of Elemental Evil, my 2003 video game.

item.title: Temple Development Timeline
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today let’s do the Temple of Elemental Evil development timeline.

item.title: Thoughts On A Temple Remake
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my thoughts on a temple remake, a remake of Temple of Elemental Evil, with things I would like to do that either I ran out of time to do or wish

item.title: Temple Of Elemental Evil Press Event
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about the Temple of Elemental Evil press event.

item.title: The Fun of The Temple of Elemental Evil
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim, so yesterday’s video about Temple development to evil was a little heavier.

item.title: The Trials of The Temple of Elemental Evil
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim, so by now we’ve I’ve talked about troika’s games, Arcanum and bloodlines.
